name: Decision Citation Check
description: Each onboarding action must cite the policy document section and version used by the reviewer.

name: Policy Applicability Check
description: Validate country client type and risk rating before applying regional onboarding obligations.

name: Four Eyes Review
description: A second reviewer confirms profile evidence ownership screening and approval notes before completion.

name: Evidence Completeness Gate
description: Block approval when mandatory documents or ownership evidence are missing from the case file.

name: Screening Clearance Gate
description: Block onboarding until sanctions PEP and adverse media results are cleared or escalated.

name: Sensitive Data Redaction Check
description: Redact national IDs tax IDs and signer personal data from exports used outside the case team.
